title: The Fight Climbs Higher
description: On pages 17–20, the fight climbs higher focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
scene: On pages 17–20, the fight climbs higher focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's a shark in the water!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: With the speeds I can attain underwater, nobody can stop me...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong jumped out from the water!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
